component.name: Matrix Calculator
component.summary: Scientific Qt calculator with local natural-language math help

description.p: Matrix Calculator is a scientific calculator for Linux built with PySide6, combining a modern Qt interface with fast everyday math and optional assistant features.
It combines a classic basic calculator, an extended scientific layout, local natural-language math handling, history, live previews and optional OpenAI API integration.
The default experience stays local and works without signing in. Online AI remains optional and only activates when the user provides an API key.

screenshot.caption: Graphite theme with calculator and assistant side by side
Alternative green theme with the assistant answer panel open
